word: H4163 - מֹוצָאָה - môwtsâʼâh - mo-tsaw-aw' - Draught house; going forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: מוצאה

Transliteration: môtsâ'âh

Phonetic: mo-tsaw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. origin, place of going out from
    1. origin
    2. places of going out to or from
      1. privy

Origin: from H4161

TWOT entry: 893d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
